<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/services/agent_platform_service.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T10:00:38Z

## Purpose
Unified agent platform integration service.

This service provides one honest setup/status layer for the requested agent
stack: Harness Agent, OpenClaw, Paperclip, PoliysAI governance, CUA, Stagehand,
and Playwright. It does not claim external SDKs are installed. It reports local
working bridges and blocks real side effects behind policy checks.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import hashlib
- from `_` import importlib.util
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import urllib.error
- from `_` import urllib.parse
- from `_` import urllib.request

## Inputs
- Env vars: AGENTOPS_API_KEY, AGENTOPS_ENABLED, AGENT_MODEL, BEV_OLLAMA_HOST, BEV_PAPERCLIP_ROOT, BROWSERBASE_API_KEY, CUA_AUDIT_PATH, CUA_IDEMPOTENCY_MAX_ENTRIES, CUA_IDEMPOTENCY_PATH, CUA_IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_SECONDS, ENABLE_REAL_CUA, HOLY_LLM_MODEL, KIVI_MODEL, OLLAMA_HOST, PLAYWRIGHT_ALLOWLIST, POLIYSAI_API_KEY

## Process
### Classes
- `_AgentOpsSession`: Context manager wrapping one CUA call. All AgentOps SDK calls are
- `AgentPlatformIntegrationService`: Status, governance, and dry-run execution facade for agent tools.
### Functions
- `_idempotency_disk_load()`: Populate _idempotency_cache from the JSONL backing file. Called lazily
- `_idempotency_disk_append(tenant_id, key, response, stored_at)`: Append one entry to the JSONL backing file. Best-effort — disk errors
- `_playwright_allowlist()`: (no docstring)
- `_target_in_allowlist(target, allowlist)`: (no docstring)
- `_write_cua_audit_row(row)`: Append one §38.3-shaped audit row. Best-effort — disk errors are logged but
- `_agentops_enabled()`: True only when explicitly opted-in. Default off; never default-on.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Per §47.6 + §38.3 — every real Playwright session writes one audit row per nav.
- Per §42 + §47.6 — default allowlist is localhost only. Operator can extend via env.
- Per §10.3 — idempotency cache TTL in seconds (5 minutes). Configurable via env
- for testing (e.g., CUA_IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_SECONDS=0.1 to exercise TTL-expiry path).
- Max entries before LRU-style trim. Protects memory on long-running processes.
